name: John, Author of The Ladder of Divine Ascent
troparia: (Tone 4) We find your virtues to be a ladder* leading us to heaven, O venerable father John.* You have become virtue personified, o glorious saint.
kontakia: (Tone 4) The Lord has placed you on the pinnacle of chastity, O father John, our guide.* Like a brilliant star you shed light on the earth.
